metadata.polylineNote: polylineCoordinates define the static display shape of each edge. Fixed — never changes with traffic. Use mkDirectionsTransportType with MKDirections for live ETA only.

train.notes: Beep Card required for stored-value tap; single-journey tokens accepted on all lines

bus.notes: EDSA Carousel and point-to-point buses use Beep Card or exact cash

jeepney.notes: Traditional jeepneys are cash only. E-Jeepneys (EJEEPNEY_* lines) accept GCash, Maya, and Beep Card

tricycle.notes: Cash only. Operates within a fixed barangay franchise zone; not allowed on national roads

walk.notes: Interchange transfer walks. Always included regardless of mode filter. Operating-hours check is bypassed for walk edges

cash.notes: Universally accepted. Exact change preferred on jeepneys and tricycles

beep_card.notes: AFC stored-value card. Required for MRT-3, LRT-1, LRT-2, EDSA Carousel. Also accepted on E-Jeepneys

gcash.notes: Accepted on E-Jeepney lines only. QR scan on vehicle terminal

maya.notes: Accepted on E-Jeepney lines only. QR scan on vehicle terminal

card.notes: Credit/debit card. Currently only used for interchange walks where no fare is charged. Not yet accepted on revenue-service vehicles
